name: Rocky Road Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3 cups of confectioner's sugar, 1/4 cup hot water, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a small mixing bowl.
2. Add the egg and melted baking chocolate to the mixture; mix well.
3. Gradually add the softened butter, tablespoon at a time, beating thoroughly with an electric mixer after each addition.
4. If the mixture is thin and soft after adding all the butter, place the bowl in a pan of ice water and continue to beat until it reaches spreading consistency.
5. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
6. This frosting will cover 2 standard-sized (8- or 9-inch) layers or tops of 3 dozen cupcakes or 1 bundt cake.
